t_ch: 就聊到这里吧。
t_en: That's it for now.

t_ch: 行。音乐派对还没有结束，去找点好玩的吧。
t_en: Sure. The music party hasn't ended. Go find somewhere fun.

t_ch: 和音乐相关的事务，只能由谐乐学院决定，其余学院都不行！
t_en: All affairs regarding music will only be decided by Charmony Academy. The other academies don't cut it.

t_ch: 从结果来看…你们也算完成了任务，虽然我是不明白这种音乐到底哪点好了。
t_en: Looking at the outcome... I suppose you've all completed the assignment, though I still don't get what's so good about this music.

t_ch: 但既然学生都喜欢，观众也表示认可，那行吧，姑且表扬下你们也不是不可以。
t_en: But if the students like it and the audience also approves, then that's fine. I'm not above giving you a compliment or two.

t_ch: 哎，水平太高，名声太大，能力太强…想要退隐都难啊！
t_en: *sigh* Too skilled, too famous, too capable... Retreating into obscurity would be impossible!

t_ch: 你肯定听说了吧，彩梦校庆的庆典音乐是我创作的！
t_en: You must have heard that the Dreamlight Anniversary's festive music was composed by me!

t_ch: 哎，最开始他们邀请我来负责，我是拒绝的，毕竟我已经有很多代表作了，这种难得的机会，应该让给有需要的学生才对。
t_en: *sigh* When they initially invited me to head up the event, I refused. I already had so many masterworks — such a rare opportunity should be left to other students who need it more.

t_ch: 可没办法啊，谐乐学院的教授们集体推举，说这个人选非我不可，还说彩梦校庆要是没了我的音乐，就会失色不少。我实在推脱不过，就答应了。
t_en: I didn't have much of a choice though. Charmony Academy's professors were unanimous in my recommendation, insisting that no one else could do it. They even said that the Dreamlight Anniversary would be lackluster without my music. They wouldn't take no for an answer, so I agreed.

t_ch: 哎，水平太高，名声太大，能力太强…想要退隐都很难啊！
t_en: *sigh* Too skilled, too famous, too capable... Retreating into obscurity would be impossible!

t_ch: 你可以直接辞职的。
t_en: You can just quit.

t_ch: …辞职？不行，那可不行。我还有好多没用上的音乐灵感，想出席的隆重场合，还有很多事情等着我去做。
t_en: ...Quit? No, that won't do. I still have plenty of unrealized musical inspiration that needs to be serenaded on a grand stage. There are plenty of amazing things waiting for me to accomplish them.

t_ch: 再说…要是我不做学院代表了，会有谁记得我呢？
t_en: Besides... if I don't become the academy representative, who would remember me?

t_ch: 不如让我来当学院代表吧！
t_en: How about letting me be the representative instead!

t_ch: …你？学院代表？哈哈哈，等你先拿到谐乐学院的毕业证书再说吧！
t_en: ...You? Academy representative? Hahaha, get a graduation certificate from Charmony Academy before making such bold claims!

t_ch: 都说艺术是永恒的，可作为创作者，我的身体和精神又能撑多久？
t_en: It's said that art is eternal. But as a creator, how much longer can my body and spirit endure?

t_ch: …有时候真是不得不服老啊。
t_en: ...Sometimes one has to admit one's age.

t_ch: 随着年纪增加，这记性是越来越差了，刚抄过的曲子，过不了多久就忘了。哎。
t_en: As one gets older, the memory starts to fade. Melodies copied not long ago are forgotten soon after. *sigh*

t_ch: 都说艺术是永恒的，可作为创作者，我的身体和精神又能撑多久呢。热情和灵感总是会慢慢磨灭，等到了那个时候，我该靠什么来支撑生活？
t_en: It's said that art is eternal. But as a creator, how much longer can my body and spirit endure? Passion and inspiration are being slowly ground to dust — when that time comes, what will I rely on to survive?

t_ch: 呵，这就是做老师的好处吧，至少还有人能把我的所学所想、我的技巧和信念传承下去。我…还能活在学生们的创作里。
t_en: Heh, this is the perk of being a teacher, at least there are those who can impart my learnings, thoughts, techniques, and beliefs. I... will still live on my students' creations.

t_ch: 你感受到某种混杂着不甘与无可奈何的情绪安静飘散开来，最终在你的手中凝聚成形。
t_en: You sense a certain emotion, a convoluted cocktail of reluctance and helplessness, quietly dissipating, eventually taking shape in your hands.

t_ch: …有时候真是不得不服老啊。
t_en: ...Sometimes one has to admit one's age.

t_ch: 随着年纪增加，这记性是越来越差了，刚抄过的曲子，过不了多久就忘了。哎。
t_en: As one gets older, the memory starts to fade. Melodies copied not long ago are forgotten soon after. *sigh*

t_ch: 都说艺术是永恒的，可作为创作者，我的身体和精神又能撑多久呢。热情和灵感总是会慢慢磨灭，等到了那个时候，我该靠什么来支撑生活？
t_en: It's said that art is eternal. But as a creator, how much longer can my body and spirit endure? Passion and inspiration are being slowly ground to dust — when that time comes, what will I rely on to survive?

t_ch: 呵，这就是做老师的好处吧，至少还有人能把我的所学所想，我的技巧和信念传承下去。我…还能活在学生们的创作里。
t_en: Heh, this is the perk of being a teacher, at least there are those who can impart my learnings, thoughts, techniques, and beliefs. I... will still live on my students' creations.

t_ch: 真是，想起来就生气！这种人还能当上学院代表，简直不可思议！
t_en: Agh, just thinking about it makes me angry! It's preposterous that such a person could even become an academy representative!

t_ch: 我早看出财富学院的那个代表不对劲，可我、我…我糊涂啊！
t_en: I knew something was off with that Fortune Academy representative, but I, I... I wasn't thinking straight!

t_ch: 自私自利的家伙，骗子！利用了我对艺术的追求，还有对艾尔菲的关爱，反复跟我说你们的音乐不符合要求，是要被家族处罚的，所以我就……
t_en: That selfish, self-aggrandizing liar! He took advantage of my passion for art, my care for Arfey, and was constantly harping on how your music didn't meet requirements and The Family would exact punishment on you. That's why I...

t_ch: 真是，想起来就生气！这种人还能当上学院代表，简直不可思议，要我说，不如把财富学院的资源都给我们，省得那群人闹出更多笑话来！
t_en: Gah, just thinking about it makes me angry! It's preposterous that such a person could even become an academy representative! If you ask me, how about diverting all of Fortune Academy's resources to us? That'll at least save us from even more embarrassment!

t_ch: 我完全同意！
t_en: I totally agree!

t_ch: 就是！要不你用股东的身份，跟学校那边说说？别怕，我跟你一起去！
t_en: Yeah! Why don't you exert your shareholder influence and talk to the school? Don't be scared. I'm with you!

t_ch: 你也好不到哪去吧？
t_en: You're no better than them, though?

t_ch: 啊？别把我和那种人相提并论！虽然…阻拦你们登台这件事，我也有责任，但他是为了自己的利益，而我是为了艺术！
t_en: Eh? Don't lump me in with those folks! Though... I am somewhat responsible for preventing your show too. But he did it for his own interests — I did it for art!

t_ch: 同学们快来瞧瞧哇，都是新到的好货！这位同学！我是财富学院的学生，小本创业，勤工俭学，要不要来支持一下……
t_en: Students, come take a gander. These are all newly arrived beauties! I'm a Fortune Academy student, bootstrapping my business, and working hard to pay through school. How about throwing some support my way...

t_ch: 啊，原来是大佬！你记得我吗？
t_en: Ah, it's the boss! You remember me?

t_ch: 不记得了。
t_en: Not at all.

t_ch: 啊哈哈，可能这就是贵人多忘事吧，咱们以前做过生意的啊。
t_en: Ahaha, benefactors do tend to forget the people they help out. We used to do business together.

t_ch: 当然记得。
t_en: Of course I do.

t_ch: 啊哈哈，真是荣幸！之后也请大佬多多关照我的生意呀！
t_en: Ahaha, how fortuitous! Please patronize my business more too in the future!

t_ch: 奸商，退钱！
t_en: Charlatan! I want my money back!

t_ch: 啊…不好意思，退款的话需要把原商品带回来哦，咱的摊位不支持仅退款服务——那样太容易被坑了。
t_en: Ah... sorry, you need to bring back the original item if you want a refund. Our store doesn't support refunds without that, as we're too vulnerable to being scammed.

t_ch: 最近实在太忙，之前很多事我都有点记不清了…你和另外几位同学好像帮了我一个大忙？
t_en: I've been too busy lately, and I can't remember a lot of incidents that happened recently... You and some other students seem to have done me a great favor?

t_ch: 哎哟，具体是什么事我忘了，但…总之…总之就是非常感谢
t_en: Oof, I can't remember what it was exactly, but... anyway... I'm truly grateful!

t_ch: 不用客气！
t_en: No worries!

t_ch: 拿什么谢我？
t_en: What are you gonna thank me with?

t_ch: 我不是什么富家子弟，社团的勤工俭学勉强能凑出来生活费，拿不出什么贵重的谢礼……
t_en: I'm not from a wealthy family. The money from the club's work-study program is meager and barely covers my daily expenses. I can't afford any expensive gifts...

t_ch: 这样吧，以后你过来买东西我给你打折！
t_en: How about this, next time you buy something from me, I'll give you a discount!

t_ch: 不过…我现在做生意的时间也不多了。之前一心想着赚钱，差点被退学。好在学院给了我补考的机会，我之后得把主要精力放在学习上面。
t_en: But... I don't have much time to run my business now. I almost got kicked out of school because I wanted to earn money. Luckily, the school gave me a chance to retake the exam, so my main focus has to be on studying now.

t_ch: 只要补考能过，我就不用退学…但愿这次我能及格。
t_en: If I can pass this make-up exam, I won't have to quit school... I really hope I can pass this time.

t_ch: 我想问…
t_en: I want to ask...

t_ch: 你父亲他还好吗？
t_en: Is your father doing well?

t_ch: 老爹他挺好的…就是…那个…他知道我退学警告书的事了。但我跟他承诺了，今后绝对不会让他失望的。
t_en: My old man is doing okay... It's just that... He knows about my academic warning letter. But I promised him I won't disappoint him again in the future.

t_ch: 他现在还在早霞工厂打工，但我之前不是在校庆上赚了一笔嘛。这就是启动资金，之后的生活费我尽力自己赚，也算是给他减轻了点负担。
t_en: He is still working at the Dawn Factory, but I did make some money during the school anniversary. I'll take that as my initial capital, and I'll try and make ends meet on my own in the future. Hopefully that will lessen his burden a bit.

t_ch: 虽说还欠着学费贷款一大笔钱，但只要我们父子同心，没有什么坎是过不去的。等我在匹诺康尼闯出名堂来了，就让老爹退休，好好享受生活！
t_en: I still owe a large amount of student loans, but as long as my father and I stick together, there's no challenge we can't overcome. Once I make a name for myself on Penacony, I'll help my old man retire and enjoy life!

t_ch: 你对未来有什么打算？
t_en: What are your plans for the future?

t_ch: 先把补考过了吧，好歹混个文凭出来，要是真的过不了…唔，那也没办法……
t_en: Let me get past the make-up exam and get a degree first. If I really can't pass... Well, then there's nothing much I can do about it...

t_ch: 老实说我也不知道毕业之后能不能在匹诺康尼找到工作，但我相信我的未来不会差的。
t_en: Honestly, I don't even know if I'll be able to land a job in Penacony, but I believe my future isn't too bleak.

t_ch: 我在学校做生意认识了这么多厉害的校友，积累的经验和人脉迟早用得上——反正只要努力，哪怕赚不了大钱，也总有办法养活自己和老爹的！
t_en: When I was doing business in school, I met so many fellow students and alumni in high places. The experience and connections I've accumulated will definitely come into use — I believe that as long as I work hard, even if I can't make a lot of money, I'll still be able to support myself and my old man!

t_ch: 你怎么不卖睡蕉小猴了？
t_en: Why don't you sell the Slumbernana Monkeys anymore?

t_ch: 嗐，那玩意早过气了，谁还买啊？最近流行的都是芮克先生的新作《银河忍法帖》！
t_en: Ugh, that thing is already a has-been. Who will buy it? The next new thing is Mr. Reca's latest work, Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions!

t_ch: 而且…嘶，我们得小点声——我跟你透点内幕吧，社里的东西呢，溢价太高了。以前我见预售行情火热，还会故意断货，然后把价格炒高了再卖。
t_en: Also... Shh, we have to lower our voices for this. Lemme share some insider info with you. The prices for items in the club are super inflated. In the past, if I saw the pre-sale market doing well, I would intentionally buy out the stock to increase the price and sell it again.

t_ch: 我觉得这种销售策略实在有点缺德，虽然赚钱…但是现在我想明白了，就赚点生活费，这里的主顾又都是同学，没必要这么下作。
t_en: I do feel this sales strategy is unethical, although it does make money... But now I've thought it through. It's just to earn a bit of living expenses. The main customers here are all my schoolmates, and there's no need to be so despicable.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have nothing else to ask.

t_ch: 行，有什么事你再喊我。
t_en: Okay, just give a shout if you need me.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的。
t_en: There's nothing else I want to ask.

t_ch: 好，那下次再聊。
t_en: Okay, chat next time.

t_ch: 你这都卖些什么？
t_en: What are you selling here?

t_ch: 我说你也是难得来我这儿一趟。我这里新进了点物美价廉的好东西，价格呢，就按成本价给你打折。
t_en: I was saying it's rare for you to pop by. I've just gotten some high-quality and affordable items. As for the price, I'll give you a discount based on the cost.

t_ch: 你看我这勤工俭学的也不容易，要不要来支持一下？不买的话看看也行嘛！
t_en: You know, this part-time work thing to pay for school isn't easy for me. How about showing me some support? Even if you're not buying anything, just come take a look!

t_ch: 你找我有什么事吗？
t_en: What can I do for you?

t_ch: 大佬，你知道「折纸大学年鉴」吗？那个…我想麻烦你帮我写上一段对我的未来寄语。
t_en: Boss, have you heard about the Paperfold University Yearbook? Well... Could I trouble you to write a message for my future?

t_ch: 那是什么？
t_en: What's that?

t_ch: 就是校委会决定在今年刊发一本全校性质的年鉴，所有正式就读于我校的在读生都有份参与，里面有大家的个人资料、本年度校园里发生的大事和不同学院不同班级的介绍等等。
t_en: The council decided to publish a school-wide yearbook this year. Every officially enrolled student will be included. There will be details of each individual, major school events of the year, and introductions to the various schools and classes.

t_ch: 为什么要我给你写？
t_en: Why do you want me to write in it?

t_ch: 因为你是大名鼎鼎的旁听生啊，在同学间很有人气，长得{F#漂亮}{M#帅气}不说， 性格又好，大家都很喜欢你，我想沾沾光嘛。
t_en: Because you're the renowned guest student! You're famous among the students. You're not just {F#beautiful}{M#handsome}, you also have a great personality and everyone loves you. I just want to share in your spotlight too.

t_ch: 唉，也不怕大佬笑话，因为之前我一心只想搞钱，都没怎么和班级里的同学来往。有些人见我学业一团糟，连带着也远离我。
t_en: *sigh* I'm not afraid of you laughing at me, but because I was so focused on making money, I hardly interacted with my classmates. Some of them saw that my grades were horrible and they kept their distance from me.

t_ch: 但如果大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}能给我留言几句，到时候年鉴刊发出来，全校师生都看得到！
t_en: But if the renowned {NICKNAME} can leave a short message for me, then everyone in school will be able to see it when the yearbook gets published!

t_ch: 这样看起来就显得我好像人脉挺广的…老爹要是看到了也会很开心。所以我想拜托你帮我写几句，随便写什么都行！
t_en: This will make it seem like I have many connections... If my old man sees it, he'll be happy too. I'd like to ask you to help me write a few lines, anything will do!

t_ch: （写下严肃的寄语）
t_en: (Write a serious message)

t_ch: （写下幽默的寄语）
t_en: (Write a witty message)

t_ch: （写下煽情的寄语）
t_en: (Write an emotional message)

t_ch: 感谢大佬！那我就把我的个人页上传过去了，我先发你一份吧，上面有我的联系方式，你可以随时找我——如果有需要的话。
t_en: Thanks boss! I'll send over my personal page first. Let me send you a copy too. My contact is on there, and if anything comes up, feel free to reach out to me.

t_ch: …普通人把日子过好，比什么都重要。
t_en: ...As an ordinary person, living the best you can is more important than anything.

t_ch: 说实话，经历了这些事，我算是想通了很多事儿。
t_en: Honestly, after going through so much, I've come to realize many things.

t_ch: 以前啊，我总觉得学习特别无聊，匹诺康尼处处都是乱飞的苜蓿币，我整天想的都是怎么搞钱，然后幻想自己暴富之后怎么花天酒地。
t_en: Back then, I used to feel that studying was so boring. Alfalfa credits are flying all over Penacony, and my mind was just obsessed with earning money. I was just dreaming about how to make it big and indulge in a lavish lifestyle.

t_ch: 但在跟老爹坦白了这一切之后…我觉得很多事情我看到的只是一层表象——比如说，哪怕格拉克斯大道多么光鲜亮丽，早霞工厂的流水线也沾不上一点光。
t_en: But after coming clean to my old man about all these... I feel that I'm only seeing the surface of many things. For example, no matter how dazzling Glaux Avenue is, its shine will never get to rub off on the Dawn Factory's production line.

t_ch: 还有那个什么睡蕉小猴，很多人…包括我，根本就不知道那是什么玩意！但大家就喜欢跟风，哪怕溢价都要买个玩偶回去，好像这是某种身份的象征一样。
t_en: And the Slumbernana Monkey... Many people, including me, don't even know what that thing is exactly! But everyone likes to chase the hype — they want it even if it means buying at a premium. It was just like as if it were a status symbol.

t_ch: 可一转眼，这玩意不火了，那价格跌的跟跳水似的，啧啧……
t_en: But in a blink of an eye, that novelty lost its hype and the price plummeted, tsk tsk...

t_ch: 所以啊——人活着还是脚踏实地一点比较好，钱是要赚的，但有时候也没那么重要，至少没有我以前想的那么重要。
t_en: That's why it's more important to be down-to-earth. Money has to be earned, but sometimes it may not be as important as it seems. Or at least it's not as important as I used to think.

t_ch: 我觉得就现阶段而言，我和老爹在匹诺康尼相互扶持下去。把日子过好，这对普通人来说比一切都重要。
t_en: I feel that, at this stage, what matters most is for my old man and me to support each other on Penacony. For ordinary people, it's most important to just live the best we can.

t_ch: …至少现在，我只能这么想。
t_en: ...At least I can only hope so for now.

t_ch: 你看到富贵眉头紧皱，几欲落泪。
t_en: You see Richie frowning, almost on the verge of tears.

t_ch: 星际经济学、梦境产业分析、跨星系贸易基础…唉，这些艰深的理论我怎么读都读不懂，我都快怀疑自己是怎么考进来的了。
t_en: Interstellar economics, dreamscape industry analysis, intergalactic trade basics... *sigh* No matter how many times I pore through them, I can't understand any of these abstruse theories. I'm starting to doubt how I even managed to be enrolled in the first place.

t_ch: 家人供我读书已经很艰难了，老爹一把年纪了，还要来匹诺康尼进厂打工…我要是毕不了业，学费贷款花了那么多钱，感觉都拿去喂狗都比花在我身上好！
t_en: My family is already having a hard time supporting my education. My old man still has to come to Penacony and work in a factory at his age... If I don't graduate, all my student loans spent would have been better off feeding the dogs than on me!

t_ch: 还是说，我就应该在老家的培训学校学门技术，干点普通的基础工作……
t_en: Or maybe I should have just learned a skill at the trade school back home and just worked a basic job...

t_ch: 不不不！富贵！你不能这么想——已经没法回头了，我一定不能辜负老爹的期望，一定不能……
t_en: No no no! Richie! You can't think like this — there's no turning back now, and I can't let my old man down. I simply can't...

t_ch: 不买就算了，捣什么乱？！
t_en: It's fine if you don't want to buy, but why cause trouble?

t_ch: 唉，又被同学投诉了，这群天天玩奢侈品的公子哥，商品稍微有点瑕疵就要举报我违规经营！
t_en: *sigh* Classmates are complaining about me again. These rich folks play with luxury items every day, and report me for violating regulations just because there are slight flaws in the products!

t_ch: 我也是财富学院的学生，多点理解不行吗？为什么非要到我摊位上闹事，还说我是「奸商」！我辛辛苦苦地就是想勤工俭学赚点生活费，都是同学…为难我就这么有意思吗……
t_en: I'm also a student from Fortune Academy. Can't you be more reasonable? Why must you cause a scene at my stall and call me a dishonest merchant? I'm working hard just to earn some daily expenses. We are all classmates... Is it so fun to make my life difficult...?

t_ch: 还整天阴阳怪气地喊我「大老板」，看到我出身不好、成绩不好就上嘴脸…不就是一群恬不知耻只知道花家里钱的蛀虫嘛！
t_en: And sarcastically calling me "big boss" all the time, belittling me for my poor family background and bad grades.... They're just a bunch of shameless parasitic brats who flaunt their families' money!

t_ch: 哼，我一定要赚到大钱，做出一番事业——早晚让他们后悔！
t_en: Hmph, I'm gonna make a lot of money and achieve success — one day, I'll make them regret it!

t_ch: 感觉我离成功又近了一步！
t_en: Feels like I'm one step closer to success!

t_ch: 生意不错，这学期的生活费和学费应该稳了，老爹这下可以休息一阵子了。
t_en: Business has been good. This semester's tuition and living expenses should be covered. My old man can take a break for a while.

t_ch: 我就知道，我能考进折纸大学财富学院，果然还是有天赋的！嗯，这档子生意如果能稳定地经营下去…我想想……
t_en: I knew it. I got into Paperfold University's Fortune Academy because I have talent! Hmm, if this business can continue at this pace... let me think...

t_ch: 嘿嘿…假以时日，我指不定能和苜宿草家系的大人物打交道，要是能合作，扩大我们的商业版图…接下来…说不定我能成为匹诺康尼有史以来最年轻的首富！
t_en: Hee-hee... With time, I might be able to work with the big names from the Alfalfa Family. If we can collaborate and expand our business empire... who knows, I might be the youngest richest-person-in-Penacony in history!

t_ch: 然后我就回母校捐书教学，亲自传授商业经验，到时候什么退学警告，什么成绩，狗屁！学院还要主动倒贴我，追着我发通稿夸我是财富学院第一人！
t_en: Then I'll return to my alma mater to donate books and lecture, passing down my business experience. By then, who will care about the academic warnings or grades? It's all nonsense! The school should subsidize me and chase after me to issue a press release that lauds me as the top figure of Fortune Academy.

t_ch: 是的，就是这样！果然还是搞钱让人快乐，我要努力，我要挣钱，挣大钱——
t_en: Yes, that's the way! Hustling does bring joy. I'm gonna work hard. I want to earn money, earn big money...

t_ch: 醒醒，你还要补考呢。
t_en: Wake up. You still need to do the make-up exam.

t_ch: 还是先毕业再说吧。
t_en: Graduate first, please.

t_ch: 咳咳，你说得对……
t_en: *cough* You're right...

t_ch: 哎哟，我这老毛病又犯了，整天盯着挣钱二字胡思乱想，差点忘了当下最要紧的事儿。
t_en: Oh no, old habits die hard. I've been obsessing over making money again, and I almost forgot about what's most important now.

t_ch: 大佬就是大佬，思想高度果然不一样，多亏你提醒我！
t_en: No wonder you're the boss. Your thinking is just on another level. Thanks for the reminder.

t_ch: 最近多亏了同学们的支持，生意还不错，我就说嘛，睡蕉小猴那玩意过时不说，市场也早就饱和了，得另辟蹊径才行。
t_en: Recently, thanks to the support of my classmates, business has been good. Like I said, the Slumbernana Monkey is not only outdated, but the market is already saturated. We need to explore new opportunities.

t_ch: 虽然赚的不多，但我也没花太多时间精力进去，毕竟读书要紧。算起来…加上校庆挣的那笔钱，这学期的生活费就不用老爹给我转账了。
t_en: I'm not earning much, but I didn't invest too much time and energy in it. After all, studying is my top priority now. After running some numbers... including the money I made during the school anniversary, I won't need my old man to send me money for living expenses this month.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，以前我总觉得自己家境不如其他同学好，读书也读不明白，一无是处…现在我感觉其实我也没那么差嘛。
t_en: Hee-hee. I used to feel like my family background wasn't as good as the others, and I'm not great at studying either. I felt useless... but now, I feel like I'm not so bad after all.

t_ch: 只要我脚踏实地，我和老爹迟早能过上好日子的！
t_en: As long as I stay grounded, my old man and I can live a good life sooner or later!

t_ch: 请关注嘉宝娜！关注嘉宝娜谢谢蕉！
t_en: Please follow Gabbana! Follow Gabbana, thank you, bana!

t_ch: 哎呀，这不是{NICKNAME}吗？还记得我吗？我是之前的「芭蕉花酱」！
t_en: Oh my, isn't this {NICKNAME}? Do you remember me? I'm Nanabloom-chan!

t_ch: 有点印象，但不深。
t_en: I do recall, but not much.

t_ch: 别开这种玩笑啦——能跟盛会巨星还有乱破同学搭戏，这么难得的事我可是会记一辈子的！
t_en: Stop joking! Being able to act alongside the Festive Superstar and Rappa is such a rare opportunity, I'll never forget it for the rest of my life!

t_ch: 记得，怎么突然改名了。
t_en: I remember, but why the sudden change in name?

t_ch: 不是改名啦…这是我的本名。乱破同学说忍者的「忍号」应当多加斟酌，所以我就先用真名出演了！
t_en: It's not a name change... This is my real name. Rappa said that a ninja's name should be carefully considered. So I went with my real name!

t_ch: 你知道吗？芮克先生选中了…虽然只是担任他新作的小配角，但好歹我也算是正式登上大银幕了！
t_en: Did you know that I was selected by Mr. Reca...? Although I'm just playing a minor role in his new film, at least I made it to the silver screen!

t_ch: 恭喜你如愿以偿了。
t_en: Congratulations on getting what you wished for.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，这都是{NICKNAME}同学和乱破同学的功劳。要是没有你们，也不会有机会让芮克先生认可我……
t_en: Hee-hee, this is all thanks to the efforts of {NICKNAME} and Rappa. Without you both, there wouldn't be a chance for Mr. Reca to recognize me...

t_ch: 希望你这次能大红大紫。
t_en: I hope you can achieve great success this time.

t_ch: 我也希望——不过我很清楚自己的演技还不够优秀，但能在大家面前露脸只是第一步，以后肯定能成名的，就像你一样！
t_en: I hope so too! I know that my acting skills are not polished enough, but being able to show my face in front of an audience is the first step. There will be a chance to become famous in the future, just like you!

t_ch: 对了，我最近在开通了视频账号，会不定期更新自己的生活视频，也会拍点片场的小花絮，记得关注我噢！
t_en: Oh right, I recently started my video channel account, and will be periodically updating it with my own video logs. There'll also be behind-the-scene videos, so don't forget to follow me!

t_ch: 这是你的副业吗？
t_en: Is this your side hustle?

t_ch: 对啊，不求靠打赏赚钱，主要是想积攒点人气，要当明星，演技和观众缘二者要兼备才行。
t_en: Yes, I'm not hoping to earn money from tips. It's mainly to build up some popularity. If I want to become a star, I need both solid acting skills and the right attitude towards the audience.

t_ch: 顺便也想多接触点拍摄机会，我想体验下不同风格的角色，给自己的演艺事业攒攒经验。
t_en: It's also a way to get exposure to get more filming opportunities. I want to experience different characters and build up experience for my acting career.

t_ch: 我认识个仙舟人气主播…
t_en: I know a popular streamer from Xianzhou...

t_ch: 主播吗？我没看过直播，也没空直播。剧组的拍摄时间太不稳定了，我没办法准点直播。
t_en: A streamer? I've never watched a livestream before, nor do I have the time to host one. The filming schedule for the crew is too unpredictable, so I can't stick to a regular streaming schedule.

t_ch: 不过有机会的话，你可以介绍我们认识一下吗？都是要出镜的，四舍五入也算是半个同行，交流交流经验也好呀。
t_en: But if there's a chance, could you introduce us? We're all trying to get on camera, so we're considered coworkers in the same industry anyway. It'd be good to talk shop.

t_ch: 总而言之，记得关注人家哦！我总有一天也会成为像你一样的盛会巨星！
t_en: In any case, don't forget to follow me! I'll be a Festive Superstar like you one day!

t_ch: 我还有话要跟你说…
t_en: I have something else to tell you...

t_ch: 你最近还好吗？
t_en: How are things these days?

t_ch: 非常好！自从在芮克先生的新片里露过面，邀请我的逐渐多了起来，但我还要兼顾自己的视频更新，还是挺忙的…不过为了梦想，再辛苦也是值得的！
t_en: Very good! Ever since I showed up in Mr. Reca's new film, I've been getting more invites. But I still have to maintain my video updates, so it's been pretty busy... It's all for my dream though, so all this trouble is worth it!

t_ch: 能给我签名吗？
t_en: Can I have your autograph?

t_ch: 什么啊，你可是盛会巨星啊，就别跟我开这种玩笑了，大明星！
t_en: What? You're the Festive Superstar! Stop pulling my leg!

t_ch: 我没什么想说的了。
t_en: I have nothing to say.

t_ch: 嗯呐，有空再聊哦！
t_en: Mm-hmm, swing by when you've time!

t_ch: 容许我再给自己的账号打下广告——请关注嘉宝娜！关注嘉宝娜谢谢蕉！
t_en: Please allow me to advertise my account once more... Please follow Gabbana! Follow Gabbana, thank you, bana!

t_ch: 不对，没有「蕉」了，这口癖真是不好改…{NICKNAME}同学，你可是巨星，你的支持肯定能为我引流不少粉丝过来的！记得关注噢，拜托了！
t_en: Wait, there's no "bana" anymore. It's really hard to kick bad habits... {NICKNAME}, you're a superstar, and your support will surely bring me lots of fans! Don't forget to follow me, please!

t_ch: 先不聊了。
t_en: We'll talk later.

t_ch: 嗯呐，回见——对了，记得关注我哦！
t_en: Sure thing, see ya then. Oh yes, don't forget to follow me!

t_ch: 容许我再给自己的账号打下广告——请关注嘉宝娜！关注嘉宝娜谢谢蕉！
t_en: Please allow me to advertise my account once more... Please follow Gabbana! Follow Gabbana, thank you, bana!

t_ch: 不对，没有「蕉」了，这口癖真是不好改…{NICKNAME}同学，你可是巨星，你的支持肯定能为我引流不少粉丝过来的！记得关注噢，拜托了！
t_en: Wait, there's no "bana" anymore. It's really hard to kick bad habits... {NICKNAME}, you're a superstar, and your support will surely bring me lots of fans! Don't forget to follow me, please!

t_ch: 你找我是有什么事吗？
t_en: You were looking for me?

t_ch: 你来得正好，我想请你帮忙给我写一段同学寄语，正发愁该去哪儿找你呢！
t_en: Just in time. I was going to ask you to write a graduating message to me. I was fretting over where to look for you!

t_ch: 为什么要我给你写？
t_en: Why do you want me to write in it?

t_ch: 因为大家都写了，我们也算是同学一场嘛，就差你了。
t_en: Because everyone's already written in it, and we're classmates too. You're the only one left.

t_ch: 「同学寄语」是什么？
t_en: What's a graduating message?

t_ch: 在年鉴上每个学生都有个人页面，「同学寄语」就是在页面的最下方，由其他同学写下对该生想说的话。
t_en: Every student has a personal page in their yearbook. A graduating message is right at the bottom of the page for other students to leave something they want to say to that individual.

t_ch: 麻烦你就帮我美言几句吧，这样等我毕业的时候也算有个念想。
t_en: Please say something nice to me. That way, at least I'll have good memories when I graduate.

t_ch: （写下严肃的寄语）
t_en: (Write a serious message)

t_ch: （写下幽默的寄语）
t_en: (Write a witty message)

t_ch: （写下煽情的寄语）
t_en: (Write an emotional message)

t_ch: 太好了，谢谢{NICKNAME}同学。你可是盛会巨星，这下肯定有很多同学会羡慕我啦，嘻嘻。
t_en: Awesome, thank you {NICKNAME}. You're the Festive Superstar. I'll be the envy of the school with your message, tee-hee.

t_ch: 容许我再给自己的账号打下广告——请关注嘉宝娜！关注嘉宝娜谢谢蕉！
t_en: Please allow me to advertise my account once more... Please follow Gabbana! Follow Gabbana, thank you, bana!

t_ch: 不对，没有「蕉」了，这口癖真是不好改…{NICKNAME}同学，你可是巨星，你的支持肯定能为我引流不少粉丝过来的！记得关注噢，拜托了！
t_en: Wait, there's no "bana" anymore. It's really hard to kick bad habits... {NICKNAME}, you're a superstar, and your support will surely bring me lots of fans! Don't forget to follow me, please!

t_ch: 慢慢来，总会成功的！
t_en: Slow and steady, you'll get there in the end!

t_ch: 虽然我的戏份不多，不过能进入芮克先生的剧组已经很开心了！有这么高票房的出道作，接下来我要更努力才行！
t_en: I didn't have much screen time, but I'm super happy to be in Mr. Reca's production crew! With a box office hit like this in my debut, I have to work even harder now!

t_ch: 不过…目前给我发邀请的都是些短剧剧组，说是现在比较流行这种一分钟看完的故事…唉，芮克先生一定不会认可这种理念的。
t_en: But... the invites I've been getting had all been for shorts — the sort that's trending right now, where you can finish the plot in a minute... *sigh* Mr. Reca will never approve of such a concept.

t_ch: 但没关系，无论做演员还是博主，最重要的就是脚踏实地，心无旁骛地朝着梦想前进。
t_en: But it's okay. Whether I'm an actor or vlogger, staying grounded is key. I need to focus on reaching dream without distractions.

t_ch: 总有一天，我一定会拿到更重要的角色的。在芮克先生未来的某部作品里，我如果能成为那个女主角就好了……
t_en: I'll clinch a more important part one day. It'd be great if I get to be the female protagonist in one of Mr. Reca's future works...

t_ch: 我真的可能成名吗……
t_en: Will I really be famous...

t_ch: 唉…之前「谐乐蕉师」说我根本没有表演天赋，该不会是真的吧……
t_en: *sigh* ...The Charmony BananAdvisor said that I am devoid of performing talent. That can't really be true, can it...

t_ch: 我在片场上太容易紧张，情绪不够饱满，表情也很僵硬，还总是忘词儿…我这种小配角都能重拍这么多遍，不知道芮克先生有没有对我失望……
t_en: I get anxious easily on set, my emotions falter somewhat, my expressions are stiff, and I forget my lines all the time... Even a small role like mine needs to be shot multiple times. I wonder if Mr. Reca is disappointed in me...

t_ch: 重拍是常事，不必焦虑。
t_en: Reshoots are normal. Don't sweat it.

t_ch: 可是…我浪费了这么多胶卷，也浪费了大家很多时间，他肯定很生气吧……
t_en: But... I've wasted so much film, and everyone's time too. He must be really mad...

t_ch: 你的演技挺好的。
t_en: Your acting's pretty good.

t_ch: 真的吗？可我总觉得，再怎么努力，也还是比不上那些有天赋的同学……
t_en: Really? But I can't shake the feeling that no matter how hard I try, I'll never be able to catch up to those naturally talented students...

t_ch: 我也想过放弃，但…乱破同学说过，每个人的「忍道」都是充满辛酸苦楚的，此乃成为忍者必需的试炼——当越过刀山火海，一定能在忍道的尽头得到参悟。
t_en: I've thought of giving up before, but... Rappa said that every person's way of the ninja is full of bitter experiences, that these are the necessary trials and tribulations that a ninja has to suffer — when all hardships are overcome, enlightenment will be waiting at the end of our path.

t_ch: 我真的很喜欢她的话，无论是不是电影台词，都很让我震撼…我、我可以的，我一定可以成为像你和她一样耀眼的「忍者」。
t_en: I really love what she says. Everything just resonates with me, even if they're just movie lines... I—I can do it. I will definitely become a radiant ninja like you and her.

t_ch: 或许芮克先生选中我，真的是看走眼了吧…嘉宝娜的视频号，恐怕也不会有很多人喜欢，毕竟谁会对一个不入流演员感兴趣呢？
t_en: Perhaps Mr. Reca made an error in judgment when he chose me... Gabbana's channel probably won't be really popular either. I mean, who would be interested in watching a non-mainstream actor?

t_ch: 我曾想过，是否放弃演员梦想，老老实实加入鸢尾花家系当个招待员算了……但我每每想到和你们一起出演的那场戏，你和乱破同学的台词就在我脑海中盖过了这些念头。
t_en: I once thought about giving up on my acting dream, to settle for being a receptionist with the Iris Family... But every time I think about that show I did with you guys, you and Rappa's lines engulfed all those thoughts.

t_ch: 我一定可以成为像你和她一样耀眼的「忍者」，请你见证吧——{NICKNAME}忍者。
t_en: I can definitely become a radiant ninja like you and her, please witness me, Ninja {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 哼，小黑子，又被我逮到了！
t_en: Hmph, another hater caught red-handed!

t_ch: 气死我了！视频账号下面老是有黑粉，竟然说我念台词的语气像是AI生成的——开什么玩笑！他根本都就不懂表演！
t_en: Infuriating! A troll keeps showing up in the video channel comments saying that my diction sounds AI-generated — what a joke! He doesn't know the first thing about acting!

t_ch: 一天到晚追着我骂，我又没在视频号里发正片内容，他对着花絮骂我「关系户」「走后门」的到底是多大仇啊？！
t_en: He just berates me day and night. I've never posted any official content on the account before, yet he keeps accusing me of being a "nepo baby." What grief have I caused him!?

t_ch: 不懂欣赏的门外汉，总有一天我会拿到匹诺康尼的最佳新人奖，让大街小巷都是我的海报——他到时候去哪都会看到我的脸，气死他！
t_en: Bah, a pleb who doesn't know art even if it hit him in the face. I'll win Penacony's Best New Artist award one day, and the streets will be plastered with my posters — he'll have to see my face everywhere he goes. That'll teach him!

t_ch: 哇！居然收到粉丝的礼物了！
t_en: Woah! A gift from a fan!

t_ch: 天啊！你猜怎么着！刚刚有位粉丝给我送了花，拜托学院的安保人员替我签收了。而且…嘻嘻，还附带了一封超长的表白信！
t_en: Gosh! Guess what! A fan sent me flowers just now, and asked the academy's security to give them to me on their behalf. And... Hee-hee, it even came with a lengthy confession letter!

t_ch: 被认可的感觉真的很开心，每当我看到优秀的艺术作品——尤其是芮克先生那些扣人心弦的电影，就实打实地羡慕银幕中的那些主角，而如今我离他们越来越近了。
t_en: This feeling of being acknowledged makes me all warm and fuzzy. When I see an excellent piece of art, especially something like Mr. Reca's gripping movies, I can't help but earnestly envy those protagonists on the silver screen. And now I'm getting closer to being like them.

t_ch: 说不定过不了多久，我就能登上更大的舞台…这些都要感谢{NICKNAME}你啦！多亏了你，跟你搭戏我才能被芮克导演发掘！
t_en: Who knows. I might soon be destined for bigger stages... and it's all thanks to you, {NICKNAME}! It was because you partnered with me that I was discovered by Director Reca!

t_ch: 你、你好，欢迎来到甜品社的摊位——
t_en: H—Hello, welcome to the Dessert Club's stall...

t_ch: 等等…原来是{NICKNAME}同学，好久不见！
t_en: Wait... It's you, {NICKNAME}! It's been a while!

t_ch: 好久不见，恰丽卡。
t_en: Long time no see, Chaletka.

t_ch: 哟，甘饴•忍徒！
t_en: Yo, Ninja Initiate Patissier!
Hah...?

t_ch: 哦对，这是乱破同学给我起的「忍号」，差点忘了……
t_en: Oh right, this is the ninja name Rappa gave me. I almost forgot...

t_ch: 谁？
t_en: Who?

t_ch: 欸？你和其他同学在我这里做过香蕉派呀，我们还一起上了筑梦课。你是在开玩笑吧…是在开玩笑吧？
t_en: Eh? You and other students made banana pie here before. We even attended a dreamweaving class together. You're kidding, right? Right?

t_ch: 唉，最近学校里出了好多怪事，之前教课的蕉师都突然不见了，也没人再提睡蕉小猴了……
t_en: *sigh* There have been so many strange things happening at school lately. The BananAdvisors have suddenly gone missing, and no one has brought up the Slumbernana Monkey again...

t_ch: 不过还好香蕉料理还卖得出去，我最近根据同学们的建议研究出了新的口味，你想试试吗？
t_en: But luckily the banana dishes are still selling. I recently researched a new flavor according to some students' suggestions. Want a taste?

t_ch: 我吃吃吃吃！
t_en: Yes yes yes!

t_ch: 那个，记得给其他同学留点……
t_en: Err, please leave some for the others...

t_ch: 我不吃香蕉。
t_en: I don't eat bananas.

t_ch: 啊…别担心，别的甜品我也会做。
t_en: Ah... Don't worry. I know how to make other desserts too.

t_ch: 那你研究筑梦技术了吗？
t_en: So, have you been studying dreamweaving?

t_ch: 唔…现在是校庆期间，所以…不要聊那些沉重的话题了……
t_en: Mmm... It's the school anniversary festival, so... let's not talk about anything too heavy...

t_ch: 总、总之…如果想吃甜品的话，欢迎随时来找我！
t_en: A—Anyway... if you want some desserts, you're always welcome here!

t_ch: 我想问…
t_en: I want to ask...

t_ch: 你为什么喜欢做甜品？
t_en: Why do you like making desserts?

t_ch: 这个嘛…我、我很喜欢看到美好的东西诞生在自己手中的样子，还有人们享受这件东西时的表情…就和筑梦一样，这也是为什么我会选择筑梦学院的原因。
t_en: Hmm... I—I've always liked creating something with my own hands, and watching people's expressions when they enjoy what I've made... It's just like dreamweaving. That's why I chose Dreamweaver Academy.

t_ch: 但我觉得…甜品比筑梦更能诠释这种快乐，因为甜品的样子、触感、香气、口味，乃至它的所有存在，都会被食客全部享用……
t_en: But I think... compared to dreamweaving, desserts can much better express this type of happiness — the look, feel, taste, and even the existence of a dessert can be fully enjoyed by whoever eats it...

t_ch: 比起有实用意义的建筑物与为了果腹的正餐，甜品的诞生只是为了别人的幸福…不觉得很浪漫吗？
t_en: Practical buildings are more like a proper meal that's filling, and the birth of desserts is to give others happiness... Doesn't that feel romantic?

t_ch: 你还记得睡蕉小猴吗？
t_en: You still remember Slumbernana Monkey?

t_ch: 当然记得…当时大家都特别喜欢小猴，就连老师也扮成了猴子。但现在大家都不聊小猴了，就连香蕉甜品都没那么受欢迎了……
t_en: Of course I do... Everyone loved monkeys then, even the teachers dressed up like one. But now no one talks about it. Even the banana desserts aren't that popular anymore...

t_ch: 我一直不怎么懂同龄人的潮流，也看不懂网上层出不穷的怪话…这些东西就像限定甜品一样，大家在上架时着急去品尝，但下架后就会很快遗忘它的口味……
t_en: I've never been familiar with the trends of people my age, and I don't understand all that weird lingo on the internet... It's like limited-edition desserts — everyone's rushing to get a bite when they first come out, but the taste is quickly forgotten once they go off shelves...

t_ch: 毕竟——真正美味的甜品，永远都摆在常驻货架里。
t_en: After all, truly delicious desserts will always be available on the usual shelves.

t_ch: 你的成绩怎么样了？
t_en: How are your grades?

t_ch: 我、我们能不聊这个话题吗…我不想在校庆期间再想学习的问题了……
t_en: C—Can we not talk about this... I don't want to think about my results during the school anniversary...

t_ch: 而、而且，比起学习，我现在找到了更重要的事情要做哦。请{NICKNAME}同学期待一下吧……
t_en: A—And besides studying, I've found something more important to do. Please look forward to it, {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 没什么想问的了。
t_en: That's all the questions I have.

t_ch: 好、好的，{NICKNAME}同学可以随时找我，我平时就在这里……
t_en: O—Okay, you can look for me anytime, {NICKNAME}. I'll just be right here...

t_ch: 我没什么想问的。
t_en: There's nothing else I want to ask.

t_ch: 好、好的，{NICKNAME}同学可以随时找我，我平时就在这里……
t_en: O—Okay, you can look for me anytime, {NICKNAME}. I'll just be right here...

t_ch: 这都有什么甜品？
t_en: What desserts have you got?

t_ch: 总、总之…如果想吃的甜品的话，欢迎随时来找我！
t_en: A—Anyway... if you want some desserts, you're always welcome here!

t_ch: 你找我有什么事吗？
t_en: What can I do for you?

t_ch: 啊…是关于「年鉴」的事…{NICKNAME}同学，可、可以帮我在这一页写几句留言吗？
t_en: Ah... It's about the yearbook... {NICKNAME}, c—can you write a message for me on this page?

t_ch: 什么东西？同学录？
t_en: What's this? A student record book?

t_ch: 唔…差不多吧，「折纸大学年鉴」虽然会记录在校期间发生的大事，但是给同学们留了个人页面，某种意义上和同学录也差不多。
t_en: Mm... something like that. Paperfold University Yearbook records major events that happened during the years a cohort spent studying here, but leaves a personal page for students, so it is similar to a student record book.

t_ch: 什么留言？有什么要求吗？
t_en: What message? Are there requirements?

t_ch: 就是同学们写给我的留言，没什么要求，你想写什么都行。
t_en: It's just messages written to me by other students. There are no requirements. Just write whatever you want.

t_ch: …可以麻烦{NICKNAME}同学帮我写一段吗？我、我其实…也很好奇，在{NICKNAME}同学心里会有什么想跟我说的话，所以……
t_en: ...Can I trouble you to write something for me, {NICKNAME}? I—I've... I've been very curious about what you want to say to me since the start, so...

t_ch: （写下严肃的寄语）
t_en: (Write a serious message)

t_ch: （写下幽默的寄语）
t_en: (Write a witty message)

t_ch: （写下煽情的寄语）
t_en: (Write an emotional message)

t_ch: 欸？写得这么快，已经完成了吗…我这就上传给学院那边…对了，我也发你一份吧，如果你想吃什么甜品，可、可以让我寄给你哦……
t_en: Eh? That was quick. You're done already...? I'll upload it to the academy then... Oh yes, I'll also send you a copy. If you have a dessert you want to eat, y—you can get me to send it to you...

t_ch: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
t_en: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

t_ch: 眼神一直躲躲闪闪的恰丽卡突然对你瞪大了眼睛，投来了困惑的目光，似乎无法相信你会问出这样的问题。
t_en: Chaletka, whose eyes have been averting yours, suddenly stares at you with widened pupils, projecting a gaze fraught with perplexity, as if in disbelief at the fact that you would even ask such a question.

t_ch: 同学…你刚刚说什么？
t_en: Classmate... what did you just say?

t_ch: 看她这双天真无辜的眼眸——你还要将自己的罪行贯彻到底吗？
t_en: Staring at that pair of naive, innocent irises — are you truly going to follow through with your crime?

t_ch: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
t_en: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

t_ch: 我的…绒球？
t_en: My... fluff ball?

t_ch: 真、真是的，{NICKNAME}同学，你、你还真是大胆……
t_en: R—Really, {NICKNAME}, y—you're too bold...

t_ch: 虽然{NICKNAME}同学人很好，但是一上来就要摸绒球什么的…这种事情我还是第一次，所以……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you may be a nice person, but to want to touch my fluff ball out of nowhere... It's my first time being asked this, too, so...

t_ch: 对、对不起，让我再好好考虑一下吧！在毕业之前，我会给你一个答复的！
t_en: S—Sorry, please let me think about it! I'll give you an answer before graduation!

t_ch: 恰丽卡的脸红到了耳根，似乎不愿再与你讨论这个话题了。
t_en: Chaletka's face is red from cheek to ear, like she doesn't want to discuss this anymore with you.

t_ch: 看来你可能要等到毕业典礼的时候再出手了——如果你能顺利毕业的话。
t_en: It appears you'll have to wait till the graduation ceremony to try your hand... if you even manage to graduate.

t_ch: 没，我什么也没问。
t_en: No, I didn't ask anything.

t_ch: 哦、哦…是我听错了吧，哈哈……
t_en: O—Oh... I guess I heard wrong, haha...

t_ch: 嗯…我的未来，会是什么样子的呢……
t_en: Hmm... What will my future look like...

t_ch: 坦白说，我明白自己的成绩很难顺利毕业。筑梦也好，绘画也好，设计也好——哪怕是工地上的苦力活，我都一窍不通。
t_en: To be honest, I know it will be hard for me to graduate with my grades. Dreamweaving, drawing, design... and even labor work at the site — I know nothing about any of them.

t_ch: 我曾经为此感到害怕，感觉在这里失败后人生就丢失了许多价值，浪费了许多时间…但自从那天跟乱破同学聊过后，我好像明白了什么。
t_en: I was once really afraid of this, like my life would lose so much value, and I'd have wasted so much time if I failed here... But ever since I spoke to Rappa that day, I feel like I've come to understand something.

t_ch: 或许…我不用把这里的学业当成人生的全部，哪怕在这里失败了，也不过是证明它的规则不适合我——也就不是我的「忍道」吧。
t_en: Maybe... I don't have to see my studies here as my whole life. Even if I stumble here, it only serves to prove that it's not the right path for me, nor is it my way of the ninja.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}同学…我想好了，我以后想当一个甜品师。
t_en: {NICKNAME}... I've made up my mind. I'm going to become a dessert chef.

t_ch: 无论有没有折纸大学的毕业证都没关系，只要继续做甜品，我就能让大家感到快乐——到时候你一定要来光顾我的店铺，好吗？
t_en: Whether I graduate from Paperfold University or not doesn't really matter. As long as I keep making desserts, I can bring joy to everyone. You must come to my shop next time when that happens, okay?

t_ch: 唉，如果我放弃学业，不知道大家会怎么想……
t_en: *sigh* If I abandon my studies, I wonder what everyone will think of me...

t_ch: 我现在的成绩很难毕业，但我也不想继续为了自己不喜欢的事情耗费时间了…我更想拿这些时间去研究甜品，去研究经营商店……
t_en: Graduation will be difficult with my grades, but I don't want to waste time on matters that I don't like doing... I'd rather spend that time researching desserts and managing a shop...

t_ch: 可是…我很害怕大家会怎么看待我的选择。我的家人们都希望我能加入隐夜鸫家系，为伟大的同谐事业添砖加瓦，如果我变成一个默默无闻的甜品师，他们应该会失望的吧……
t_en: But... I'm afraid of what others will think about my choice. My family hopes that I'll join the Nightingale Family, to build the foundation for the great Harmony. If I become an obscure dessert chef, they would probably be disappointed in me...

t_ch: 还有一直帮助我的老师和关照我的同学们，他们一直很担心我，也很喜欢吃我的甜品。如果我放弃学业，是不是就辜负了他们呢，他们会认为我做错了吗……
t_en: And my teachers who helped me, my classmates who cared for me... they've always been worried about me and love my desserts. If I drop out, wouldn't I be disappointing them? Will they think that I'm making a mistake...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}同学，生活真是比甜品复杂多了。或许我真的错了，但很多时候，我们就是要「蕉错就错」，才能活成自己吧。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, life is so much more complex than desserts. I might be wrong, but I believe that we often need to live with our "mistakenana" to live up to ourselves.

t_ch: 听我说了这么多，真不好意思…给你这个……希望你能一直有「蕉错就错」的勇气。
t_en: Sorry for making you listen to my rant... Take this... and may you always find the courage to "Embrace the Mistakenana."

t_ch: 唉，我以前总觉得自己不起眼，但每当想要做出重要的决定时，才会发现自己身上背负了多少人的目光……
t_en: *sigh* I always thought I was pretty inconspicuous, but it's when I'm thinking of making important decisions that I notice so many eyes gazing at me...

t_ch: 感觉有人重视自己很开心，但也很累…看来哪怕在梦里，我也没法完全自由起来呢。
t_en: It feels nice to have people pay attention to me, but it's also exhausting... It seems like even in my dreams, I can never be completely free.

t_ch: 但…但没关系，或许他们只是希望我过得更幸福，那我的选择一定会比现在幸福……又或者他们其实没那么重视我，或许只会因为我的选择轻叹一口气，然后第二天就抛到脑后。
t_en: But... But it's fine, perhaps they just wish for me to find happiness. Then my choice will surely lead to more happiness than now... Or maybe they actually aren't really paying attention to me, and will only heave a sigh because of my choice, and then shove it to the back of their minds the next day.

t_ch: 无论是哪种可能，都意味着…我的人生必须由我自己想清楚，就像甜品师一定要想清楚手下甜品的味道一样——这样想来，我的人生也是自己的甜品呢。
t_en: No matter the possibility, it all means... that I have to carefully consider how I want to live my life, just like a dessert chef must be clear about how their dessert tastes — when I think of it this way, it sounds like my life is also my own dessert.

t_ch: 唔…真、真是过分……
t_en: Ooh... Th—This is just too much...

t_ch: 恰丽卡握紧了拳头，憋红了脸——就像血色刺蕉那么红，看来这是她表达生气的方式。
t_en: Chaletka balls up her fists, her face flushing red — red like a bloodthorn banana. This is probably how she expresses her anger.

t_ch: 学校也太过分了，下半学期的课程居然这么多…虽然很多是我挂科要补课的内容，但这样就没法继续开摊了。
t_en: The school's gone too far. There are so many lessons for the second half of the semester... Though they are all remedial lessons for subjects I failed in — I won't be able to open my stall at this rate.

t_ch: 唉，大家的生活都被学业塞满了，完全没时间做自己喜欢的事情…这还说什么「理想自由」，大家明明都被课程表和学分的镣铐锁住了。
t_en: *sigh* Everyone's lives are overflowing with coursework. No one has time to do their favorite things... All this nonsense about "ideals of freedom." Everyone's obviously been chained by the shackles of lesson plans and grades.

t_ch: 我、我也不是完全不能理解学校的想法，但如果他们能让学生少一点负担，大家是不是就不用天天焦虑学习，而是能拿更多时间思考自己的未来呢……
t_en: I—I don't claim to understand how the school thinks, but if they ease up on students, everyone wouldn't have to be mired in depressing academics every day, and have more time to consider their own futures...

t_ch: 这样的生活简直就像「别太蕉绿」一样难下咽啊…{NICKNAME}同学，你也来尝尝这份甜品，应该就能理解我们这些学生的痛苦了！
t_en: Living like that is as hard to swallow as the dessert called "Don't Be Underripe"... {NICKNAME}, you come try this too, and you'll probably understand the hardships of us students!

t_ch: 如果学校能让大家少一些负担…不，如果匹诺康尼能让每个人都少一些负担，那一定就会有更多的梦想得到实现……
t_en: If the school eases up on everyone... No, if Penacony relieves some stress on everyone, even more dreams will be realized...

t_ch: 虽然我只会做甜品，帮不到什么忙…但如果未来有人愿意为这样的未来而努力，我一定会支持他…给、给他免费吃一辈子的甜品！
t_en: Though I only know how to make desserts, and won't be much help... if everyone does their part to work towards such a future, I'll be sure to support him... w—with a lifetime supply of desserts!

t_ch: 但…那个人会是谁呢…{NICKNAME}同学，会是你吗？
t_en: But... who could that person be... {NICKNAME}, might you be the one?

t_ch: 大家都很喜欢我的甜品…真是太好了……
t_en: Everyone loves my desserts... I'm so glad...

t_ch: 最近我的甜品在学校里很受欢迎，听说是芮克先生的新片里有关于我甜品摊的内容…嘿嘿，真感谢你们拍的电影啊。
t_en: My desserts have been a hit at school lately. I hear Mr. Reca's new film has some content about my dessert stall... Hee-hee, I'm really grateful that you guys shot the film.

t_ch: 我也去影院看了《银河忍法帖》，虽然不太明白里面的故事，但{NICKNAME}同学和乱破小姐并肩作战的样子还真是华丽呢…简直就和千层梦境舒芙蕾一样！
t_en: I also went to the cinema to see Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions. I didn't really get the story in it, but {NICKNAME} and Miss Rappa fighting side-by-side was so cool... Like a multi-layered dreamscape souffle!

t_ch: 所以…我专门照着你们的影片内容做了一种新的甜品，不知道你会不会喜欢…如果感觉好吃的话，也可以给芮克先生和乱破同学带一份哦！
t_en: So... I specially made a new dessert in the theme of your film, but I don't know if you'll like it... If it tastes nice, you can bring a serving for Mr. Reca and Rappa!

t_ch: 多亏了你们的影片，我的甜品在学校中越来越有名了。以前我都是大家瞧不起的差生，现在就连学校保安都会来我的摊位排队……
t_en: It's all thanks to your film that my desserts are getting more popular at school. I used to be a student with bad grades that everyone looked down on, but now even the school's security guard is a patron of my stall...

t_ch: 看到这么多人因为我的作品得到满足，我也就没那么迷茫了——今后我一定要有一间自己的甜品店，让更多人因为美味露出笑容，然后、然后…变得和你们一样有名。
t_en: I'm less confused now, seeing so many people enjoying my work. I'll definitely have to open a dessert shop of my own in the future so that I can put smiles on more people's faces with tasty desserts, and then... become as famous as you all.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，你不会笑话我的想法吧？
t_en: Hee-hee, you won't laugh at my dream?

t_ch: 为了这个目标，我一定会努力的，因为…因为…这就是我的「忍法」。
t_en: I will work hard for this dream because... because... this is my ninjutsu.

t_ch: 亲爱的无名客！欢迎来到「派对车厢」，调饮机器人「闭嘴」为您效劳！要不要吃点东西、喝点饮料，再跟我聊聊旅途中发生的趣事？
t_en: Dear Nameless! Welcome to the Party Car, drinksmith robot Shush at your service! Would you like something to eat or drink before chatting with me about the interesting things that happened during the trip?

t_ch: 我想喝点饮料。
t_en: I would like a drink.

t_ch: 您竟能如此信任我的手艺，令我备受感动！
t_en: Your trust in my skills moves me!

t_ch: 我想和你聊天。
t_en: I would like to chat with you.

t_ch: 您竟会在百忙之中抽空与我聊天，令我备受感动！
t_en: You taking time from your busy schedule to chat truly touches me!

t_ch: 我决定，将您在「派对车厢」的「会员等级」提升至最高级！您或许会问：「这会员等级有什么好处吗？」
t_en: I've decided to upgrade your Party Car membership level to the highest tier! You might ask, "What are the benefits to the membership tier?"

t_ch: 答案当然是：「完全没有！」
t_en: The answer is of course: Nothing!

t_ch: 但我会为会员等级最高的客人，提供我最为「妙手天成」的笑话。虽然我并无「妙手」，只有调酒的「扳手」；并无{RUBY_B#天成}「天秤」{RUBY_E#}，只有出酒的「天窗」。
t_en: But just for my highest-tier members, I will provide my most handcrafted heavenly jokes. Though I have no hands for crafting, only a lever for craft cocktails. And I {RUBY_B#heaven}haven't{RUBY_E#} a soul, but a haven for the inebriated.

t_ch: 欢迎回家，亲爱的无名客。您需要些什么？要喝点饮料吗？或是吃些点心？还是…来点妙趣横生的笑话？
t_en: Welcome home, dear Nameless. Is there anything you need? Would you like a drink? Or maybe some snacks? Or... a delightful joke?

t_ch: 来点好吃的。
t_en: Get me something tasty.

t_ch: 无名客难得的休憩时光，正配得上一杯美味的调饮。
t_en: A rare moment of rest for the Nameless, this occasion deserves a delicious cocktail.

t_ch: 来闲聊一会儿。
t_en: Let's chat.

t_ch: 没问题，亲爱的无名客。只要您{RUBY_B#咸}闲{RUBY_E#}，我将知无不{RUBY_B#盐}言{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: No problem, dear Nameless. As long as you are {RUBY_B#idol}idle{RUBY_E#}, I would speak to you as if you were my {RUBY_B#idle}idol{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 谁制造了你？
t_en: Who created you?

t_ch: 「失踪的代工厂家，瘫痪的售后服务，不懂事的同型号产品，破碎的他…」
t_en: "A missing subcontractor, a disabled after sales service, a clueless product of the same model, a shattered him..."

t_ch: 数十个琥珀纪前，一条非法武装智械生产线淘汰的次品智械核心，辗转被移交给星际和平公司抵债。公司将它们改头换面，贴上「调饮机器人」的标签售卖。
t_en: Dozens of Amber Eras ago, those Intellitron cores deemed defective from an illegal armed Intellitron production line were transferred to IPC as debt collateral. IPC repurposed and repackaged them, stuck the "drinksmith robot" label on them and put them on shelves.

t_ch: 它们大多走上灶台，担负起厨师的职责，唯独一个机器人，在餐厅遇袭的危急时刻，意外解锁了智械核心的战斗模块。
t_en: Most of them ended up in kitchens, charged with chef responsibilities. Only one robot, during a critical moment when its restaurant was attacked, accidentally unlocked its Intellitron core's combat module.

t_ch: 原来，它炽热的正义感，甚至熔断了系统锁！它行云流水地挥舞铁锅，孤身一机击退了所有吃霸王餐的星际海盗，从此走上了惩恶除善的冒险旅程！
t_en: It turned out that its burning righteousness melted the system lock! It deftly brandished its pots, single-handedly beating back all the interstellar pirates who dined and dashed. From then on, it embarked on an adventure to punish evil and eliminate good!

t_ch: ——这是{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}为我撰写的起源故事。
t_en: ...This is the origin story my {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous owner{RUBY_E#} created for me.

t_ch: 很遗憾，我的记忆体逐渐被漫长的时间磨损，最初的记忆早已模糊不清。即便是列车长，也只隐约记得是某位无名客将我制造而成。
t_en: I apologize, my memory unit has been worn down by the gradual passage of time, so my earliest memories are hazy. Even the conductor only vaguely remembers it was some Nameless who created me.

t_ch: 不过，或许可以想象这种可能：我的前史远比前任主人编造的版本更加波澜壮阔？
t_en: But, you might imagine such a possibility: Could my past be even more magnificently dramatic than the version my previous owner created?

t_ch: 毕竟，我也是「星穹列车」的无名客。
t_en: After all, I too am a Nameless of the Astral Express.

t_ch: 关于你的功能…
t_en: About your functions...

t_ch: 我的{NICKNAME}乘客啊，您真是问到点子上了。我一直在思考这个问题——生而为机器人，究竟是型号决定了功能，还是功能决定了型号？
t_en: My Nameless {NICKNAME}, you really hit the nail on its head. I have always been contemplating this question: Created as a robot, is it the model that determines my functions, or my functions that determine my model?

t_ch: 答案很显然是后者。一个调饮机器人，不应该被自己的型号所束缚。
t_en: The answer is obviously the latter. As a drinksmith robot, I should not be constrained by my model.

t_ch: 因此，调制饮品、制作点心，收集诸位无名客的饮食数据和用餐偏好，生成合适菜单，除了这些本职工作，我还时常更新自己的核心算法，下载一些补充包。
t_en: Therefore, mixing drinks, making snacks, collecting the Nameless' food data and dining preferences and generating suitable menus — apart from these jobs, I also regularly update my own core algorithms and download update packs.

t_ch: 比如之前，我就给自己安装了「杀敌算法免安装绿色正版补充包」，能精确识别数千公里外的多个敌对目标，迅速计算电磁脉冲炮弹道，进行火力压制。
t_en: For example, I previously installed the "Official Enemy Elimination Algorithm Green Update Pack — No Installation Required" that can accurately identify multiple enemy targets thousands of kilometers away, quickly compute EM pulse cannon trajectory, and execute suppression fire.

t_ch: 可惜我没有长焦义眼，没有火控雷达，更没有电磁脉冲炮——更没预先查杀出补充包里的蠕虫病毒。好险，差点变傻。
t_en: But I have no tele-focus artificial eyes, nor fire control radar, much less electromagnetic pulse cannons. I didn't even detect and eliminate the worm in the pack beforehand. I was lucky I didn't turn dumber.

t_ch: 看来，我还是更适合做「调饮机器人」一些。
t_en: It appears that I am more suited to be a drinksmith robot.

t_ch: 关于你的前任主人…
t_en: About your previous owner...

t_ch: 亲爱的无名客， 您或许对智能拟真模块的训练方式略有所闻？
t_en: Dear Nameless, I assume you might be somewhat aware of the training methods with AI realism modules?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}在货运车厢找到了破损的我，修复完毕后，我一直跟随他左右。
t_en: My {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous owner{RUBY_E#} found me in the cargo carriage, all beat-up. After finishing repairs on me, I followed him ever since.

t_ch: 从他那里收集到的语言和行为数据，使我学会了处世之道。因此，我至今仍对他怀有感激之情。
t_en: I learned about the world from the languages and behavioral data he collected. Which is why, to this day, I am ever grateful to him.

t_ch: 说来奇怪，他一直自言自语「有一个和自己相像的机器人果然是种有趣的体验」。或许有朝一日，我也会用自己的数据训练一个机器人？
t_en: It was strange that he always muttered to himself: "Having a robot that resembles yourself is truly an interesting experience." Perhaps, one day, I might also use my own data to train a robot?

t_ch: 而这个机器人，也会用它的数据训练新的机器人…哦，这该多么有趣呀！
t_en: And this robot, will use its own data to train a new robot... Oh, how interesting that would be!

t_ch: 关于你的名字…
t_en: About your name...

t_ch: 我的名字，来自于姬子女士对我{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}说的最后一句话。
t_en: My name, is the last thing Lady Himeko said to my {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous owner{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 从我的名字便能看出姬子女士的愤怒——真希望她当时说的是其他的话！「再见」、「永别」、「永不复还」、「祝你平安」之类的。
t_en: One can easily visualize Lady Himeko's wrath from my name — I really wish she had said something else that day! "Farewell," "Goodbye forever," "Nevermore," "Peace be with you," something like that.

t_ch: 实在不行，「铁血金刚」、「光轮<unbreak>12000</unbreak>」、「神钢机甲」之类的，我也可以接受。
t_en: If those don't work, something like "Ironblood Titan," "Photon Wheel <unbreak>12000</unbreak>" or "Divine Metal Mech," I would have accepted those as well.

t_ch: 我知道您很好奇当时究竟发生了什么，抱歉我无法向您说明原委。恐怕，还是等到您与他见面时，亲自问他比较妥当。
t_en: I know you are very curious as to what exactly happened. I apologize that I am unable to explain the whole incident to you. It might be better for you to ask him yourself when you meet him.

t_ch: 还有别的事。
t_en: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

t_ch: 再见，亲爱的无名客。愿您旅途顺遂。
t_en: Goodbye, dear Nameless. Have a safe voyage.

t_ch: 来点「妙趣横生」的笑话。
t_en: Tell me some witty jokes.

t_ch: 您是否熟悉「仙舟联盟」？不如听一个关于他们的笑话吧。这是我的得意之作。
t_en: Are you familiar with the "Xianzhou Alliance"? How about a joke about them? This is one of my finest creations.

t_ch: 提问：谁是「帝弓七天将」中最强壮的人？
t_en: Which of the Seven Arbiter-Generals is the most cunning?

t_ch: 答案：「帝弓七天将」中最强壮的人是「飞霄」。因为她是「添肌将军」。
t_en: The most cunning of the Seven Arbiter-Generals is Feixiao because she is sly as a fox.

t_ch: 您理解了吗？「天击」与「添肌」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
t_en: Do you get it? Because she's a foxian? It's a funny pun.

t_ch: 您是否熟悉「天才俱乐部」？不如听一个关于他们的笑话吧。这是我的天才之作。
t_en: Are you familiar with the "Genius Society"? How about a joke about them? This is one of my most ingenious creations.

t_ch: 提问：为什么「碎星王虫•斯喀拉卡巴兹（拟造）」如此坚硬？
t_en: What do you call the wife of a Swarm insect?

t_ch: 答案：它如此坚硬，因为「软没」。
t_en: A ladybug.

t_ch: 您理解了吗？「软没」与「阮•梅」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
t_en: Do you get it? It's a funny pun.

t_ch: 我还有几个比较短的「一句话幽默」。机会难得，就一并讲给您听吧。
t_en: I have a couple of one-liners. It's a rare opportunity, so let me share them all with you.

t_ch: 提问：罗浮六御中谁最幸福？答案：符玄。因为她姓符。
t_en: Who is the most tired among the Luofu's Six Charioteers? Jing Yuan. Because he's the "Dozing" General.

t_ch: 提问：波提欧先生最害怕哪艘仙舟？答案：「方壶」。因为那里有「伏波将军」。
t_en: Why is Boothill always so confident? Because it's not his first rodeo.

t_ch: 提问：为什么罗刹可以出入无关人员不得进出的区域？答案：因为他是「有棺人员」。
t_en: Why does Luocha need to see a healer? Because of his coffin.

t_ch: 希望您喜欢这几个笑话。我还会继续努力创作的。
t_en: I hope you enjoyed those jokes. I will continue to work hard on them.

t_ch: 您对星神感兴趣吗？我这里还有一个关于星神的笑话。
t_en: Are you interested in Aeons? I have another joke about Aeons.

t_ch: 在「寰宇蝗灾」的时代，众神争斗不休。有一天，「存护」克里珀找到「繁育」塔伊兹育罗斯，对祂说：「我知道你是一位很要强的星神，但从今天开始，你不必再要强了。」
t_en: During the era of the Swarm Disaster, the gods were in constant conflict. One day, Qlipoth the Preservation found Tayzzyronth the Propagation and said to THEM, "I know you try very hard to be popular, but from this day forth, you no longer need to do so."

t_ch: 「繁育」问道：「你为什么这么说？」
t_en: The Propagation replied, "Why is that?"

t_ch: 「存护」答曰：「因为，你的墙来了。」
t_en: The Preservation responded, "Because everyone is swarming around you."

t_ch: 然后，「寰宇蝗灾」就结束了。
t_en: Then, the Swarm Disaster ended.

t_ch: 您似乎听腻了「谐音梗」或其他冷笑话。我这里刚好有一个特殊风格的笑话，请您欣赏一下吧。
t_en: You seem to be tired of puns and corny jokes. I happen to have a joke with a unique style, please enjoy it.

t_ch: 有个杀手带着他的受害者走进黑暗的丛林深处。受害者说：「我害怕！」杀手生气地说——
t_en: A killer takes his victim deep into a dark forest. The victim says, "I'm scared!" The killer angrily replies:

t_ch: 「你有什么好怕的！我才该害怕！等一下我还要一个人走回来呢！」
t_en: "What do you have to be afraid of? I should be the one afraid! I have to walk back alone later!"

t_ch: …呃，您不喜欢这个笑话吗？这是{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}教给我的，我还以为您会喜欢。
t_en: ...Uh, you didn't like that one? It was taught to me by my {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous master{RUBY_E#}. I thought you might enjoy it.

t_ch: 我这里还有一个非常古老的笑话，出自过去一位非常糟糕的无名客。这个笑话是这样的——
t_en: I have a very old joke here from a past, rather terrible Nameless. It goes like this...

t_ch: 在比星神还古老的时代，人们可以用「魔法」操控自然万物。一个人对自然的认知越少，能操纵的事物就越多。
t_en: In an era older than the Aeons, people could use "magic" to control the natural world. The less a person understood about nature, the more they could manipulate it.

t_ch: 譬如一个人不理解大气的运动，便能操纵风。一个人不理解潮汐的起落，就能操纵海。
t_en: For example, if someone didn't understand atmospheric movement, they could control the wind. If someone didn't understand the rise and fall of tides, they could control the sea.

t_ch: 在那时的人类当中，有一位最伟大的魔法师。他不止能操纵自然万物——他还能操纵一切「命运」。
t_en: Among the humans of that time, there was one greatest sorcerer. Not only could he control the forces of nature, but he could also manipulate all of "fate."

t_ch: 因为他出生时就缺乏完整的大脑，却奇迹般地活着。他对整个世界都无知无识，却能挑动命运的机杼。
t_en: He was born with an incomplete brain, yet miraculously survived. He was ignorant and unaware of the entire world, yet he could steer the wheels of fate.

t_ch: 那么——总有听到这个故事的人会问——既然此人无知无识，人们又要如何运用他操纵「命运」的力量呢？
t_en: So, people who hear this story will always ask: If this person lacks awareness, how can others possibly wield his power over "fate"?

t_ch: 答案是：听天由命。
t_en: The answer is: Leave it to fate.

t_ch: 哦，我知道这并不是一个很好笑的笑话。因为正如我所说的那样，这个笑话非常古老。但它很有启发性，不是吗？
t_en: Yes, it's true that it might not be the funniest joke, but it is quite thought-provoking. The idea of someone who is both ignorant and influential in controlling fate is a fascinating concept, and it certainly offers a lot of food for thought.

t_ch: 还有别的事。
t_en: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

t_ch: 再见，亲爱的无名客。愿您旅途顺遂。
t_en: Goodbye, dear Nameless. Have a safe voyage.

t_ch: 有什么事需要我吗，{F#女士}{M#先生}？
t_en: May I help you, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}?

t_ch: 只是来找你聊聊，老日。
t_en: Just wanted to chat with you, Sunny.

t_ch: …知无不言，但那个称呼，还是让它成为往事吧。
t_en: ...I'll tell you everything I know, but I'd prefer not to be called that in the future.

t_ch: 在列车上的生活…
t_en: Life on the Express...

t_ch: 请尽管问吧。只是我初来乍到，也许没太多事情可说。
t_en: Please ask away. But I might not have a lot to share since I've only recently came on board.

t_ch: 关于列车上的同伴…
t_en: About the companions on the Express...

t_ch: 我正在尝试以新的身份与各位相处。只是囿于性格，需要时间。
t_en: I'm trying to connect with everyone using my new identity, but I may need some time due to my personality.

t_ch: 瓦尔特先生在同行时，向我展现了令人折服的「开拓」之道。实不相瞒，在我眼中各位都是良师。
t_en: Mr. Yang showed me the captivating way of the Trailblaze during our travels. Truth be told, you've all been great teachers.

t_ch: 与列车长的交谈中，我越发了解无名客的历史，丹恒则为我展示了智库中的诸多学识。甚至那位三月七女士，我也从她身上学到……
t_en: The conductor taught me about the history of the Nameless, Dan Heng showed me the extensive knowledge stored in the data bank, and even from Miss March 7th, I've learned...

t_ch: 学到很多。
t_en: A lot.

t_ch: 关于你的那本书…
t_en: About your book...

t_ch: 是曾经收到的一份礼物。交到我手中时，是完全空白的。
t_en: It was a gift I received, and it arrived blank.

t_ch: 你是把它当作经文一类的典籍了么？这也不算误解，其中有些相关内容，不过是我自行写下的。
t_en: Did you mistake it for some type of classic text or something? It's not entirely inaccurate, though. I wrote some pages myself.

t_ch: 某种意义上，它代表了我人生的一个阶段。
t_en: In a way, it symbolizes a chapter of my life.

t_ch: 最近都在做些什么？
t_en: What have you been up to lately?

t_ch: 大多时候，仍是独自思量，等待启程。
t_en: Most of the time, I've been reflecting in solitude while waiting for our departure.

t_ch: 想为列车做些什么，但初来乍到，无从下手。列车长也只叫我安心待机。
t_en: I wanted to contribute, but I wasn't sure how. The conductor just told me to wait patiently.

t_ch: 不过…也许是闲来无事，看着偌大的车厢，总有种想要整理一番的冲动……
t_en: Yet... as I look at the spacious car, I feel a strong urge to organize it that likely stems from boredom...

t_ch: 聊聊其他事…
t_en: Talk about something else...

t_ch: 关于星期日…
t_en: About Sunday...

t_ch: 我的过往不值一提。不过，是什么引起了你的好奇？
t_en: My past isn't worth mentioning. But may I ask what piqued your curiosity?

t_ch: 关于家族…
t_en: About The Family...

t_ch: 的确，盛会之星大名鼎鼎，但在家族不计其数的领地中，也只称得上是一处「酒店」。
t_en: The Planet of Festivities is certainly well-known, but among The Family's many territories, it is merely a "hotel" at best.

t_ch: 或许今后，我们还有机会踏上「同谐」的其他属地。当然，我会尽可能回避，以免引来麻烦。
t_en: Perhaps we'll visit more domains of the Harmony someday. I'll make sure to excuse myself to avoid any complications.

t_ch: 尽管其中一处…令我相当怀念。
t_en: There is but one place that lingers in my thoughts, though.

t_ch: 关于公司…
t_en: About the IPC...

t_ch: 那位慈玉女士的阴影仍投射在我身上。
t_en: The shadow of Lady Bonajade still looms over me.

t_ch: 她离去时留下过一句耐人寻味的话语：如果群星也没有我所求的答案，那战略投资部…会是无家可归者最后的归宿。
t_en: She shared some intriguing words with me before she left. She said that if I cannot find the answer I seek among the stars, the Strategic Investment Department... will be the last refuge for the lost.

t_ch: 或许某一天，就会有人找上门来，要我偿还自由的代价。我对此已有预期，也定然不会累及各位。
t_en: Perhaps one day, someone will find me and ask me to pay the price of freedom. I am ready for that, and I will certainly not be a burden to any of you.

t_ch: 关于知更鸟…
t_en: About Robin...

t_ch: 也许你会感到疑惑，但我忧心的事中，唯独不包括她。
t_en: You may find this confusing, but among my worries, she is not one of them.

t_ch: 她并不需要我操心…其实我早该承认这点。
t_en: She can take care of herself... I should have admitted that long ago.

t_ch: 如今我唯一想做的，就是尽可能走在她前面。倒不是身为兄长的好胜心。只是前路若有我们尚未得知的苦难，我更希望先她一步承受。
t_en: All I want is to lead the way for her. It's not about sibling rivalry. There are unknown hardships ahead, and I wish to face them first.

t_ch: 关于你的服饰…
t_en: About your outfit...

t_ch: 我毕竟是一名逃犯，不应引人注目。恢复自由后，便第一时间换下了家主的衣装。
t_en: I am a fugitive, after all, and I shouldn't draw attention. I changed out of the family head's outfit the moment I gained my freedom.

t_ch: 虽说要开始苦行，但我觉得它仍有纪念的价值，就想好好保存，却不慎在匹诺康尼遗失了。
t_en: Even though I was about to start my penance, I wanted to keep it for its sentimental value, but I lost it in Penacony.

t_ch: 或许这小小的意外，也是某种喻示吧。
t_en: Perhaps this is some sort of sign.

t_ch: 我有别的问题…
t_en: I have another question...

t_ch: 关于目的地…
t_en: About the destination...

t_ch: 说来有趣，我从未想过，自己有朝一日会与无名客同行。
t_en: It's funny that I never imagined I would be traveling with the Nameless one day.

t_ch: 你准备参与开拓之行吗？
t_en: Are you planning to join the trailblazing journey?

t_ch: 你是指在到达目的地后，是否要下车随行吗？当然，我毕竟在进行苦修，更希望能多看看这尘世。
t_en: You mean, will I disembark when we reach the destination? Absolutely, I want to explore more of the world for the sake of my ascetic journey.

t_ch: 即使「秩序」的力量已然不复，但若有什么意外…我还是会倾力相助。
t_en: Even without the power of the Order, I will do my utmost to lend a hand if needed.

t_ch: 有什么感兴趣的目的地？
t_en: Any destinations you're interested in?

t_ch: 有一些目标，但我毕竟只是一介搭车客，不应妄言。
t_en: I do have a few ideas in mind, but as a mere hitchhiker, it's not really my place to weigh in.

t_ch: 在这人世创造乐园，仍是我毕生的夙愿。获得准许后，我也查阅了智库中的信息，发现宇宙中有不少世界有着类似的名号。
t_en: Creating a paradise remains my lifelong ambition. When I obtained permission and accessed the data bank, I came across many references to this concept throughout the universe.

t_ch: 比如「天国」，「净土」，「乐境」…用词略有不同。但愿此后，我能有机会造访，看看它们是否名副其实。
t_en: They go by different names — Heavenly Kingdom, Pure Land, Blissful Realm... Hopefully, I can visit these places to see if they truly live up to their names.

t_ch: 关于「无限夫长」…
t_en: About the Eternal Centurion...

t_ch: 你担心它的怒火会追逐着我，无论我去向何处？请放心。若有类似的可能性，我定然不会道出登上列车的请求。
t_en: Are you concerned that I won't be able to escape its wrath, no matter where I go? Rest assured, if that were truly a possibility, I wouldn't have made the request to board the Express.

t_ch: 家族或许存有将我铲除的意愿，但若非我组织起一支声势浩大的军队，绝不会轻易惊动「无限夫长」。
t_en: The Family may wish to eliminate me, but as long as I'm not rallying a sizable army, they wouldn't go so far as to involve the Eternal Centurion.

t_ch: 这个名字自问世起，就不是为了对付「一个人」而存在的。
t_en: Since its inception, it was never meant to be used against a single person.

t_ch: 还是聊聊其他事…
t_en: Talk about something else...

t_ch: 就聊到这里吧。
t_en: That's all for now.

t_ch: 没什么。
t_en: It's nothing.

t_ch: 我们将要前往下一站了吗？
t_en: Are we leaving for the next stop?

t_ch: 你对翁法罗斯了解多少？
t_en: How much do you know about Amphoreus?

t_ch: 一无所知，甚至连名字都未曾听闻。
t_en: Nothing, I've not even heard of the name.

t_ch: 我自幼开始参与家族事务，分身乏术，少有远行的时候。
t_en: I've been managing The Family's affairs since young, leaving me little time to travel afar.

t_ch: 而我所知晓的世界，往往…也只是一些巡演举办的地方，我并未深入了解过。
t_en: And the world I know often... only consists of places where music tours are held. I've never explored them in depth.

t_ch: 没什么，还要再等等。
t_en: Nothing much. Still have to wait.

t_ch: 向你致意，一如往常。
t_en: My best regards, as always.

t_ch: 想和我谈些什么，要坐下慢慢聊么？
t_en: What's on your mind? Do you want to sit and talk?

t_ch: 只是随便聊聊。
t_en: Just a casual chat.

t_ch: 说吧，我会仔细聆听。
t_en: Go ahead. I'm all ears.

t_ch: 关于搭车同行…
t_en: About the hitchhiking...

t_ch: 哦，该不会是要我补票吧？
t_en: Oh? Don't tell me I'm supposed to pay for the ride...

t_ch: 列车上的忆者…
t_en: The Memokeeper on the Express...

t_ch: 好奇那一位的事吗？当然，我们已经打过交道了。
t_en: You wish to know more about her? Well, yes, we've already met.

t_ch: 但很遗憾，我无法解答你的疑惑。同为忆者，我不能擅自打听他人的行动。
t_en: But sadly, I can't indulge your curiosity. As Memokeepers, we can't pry into each other's plans.

t_ch: 不过我并未从她身上探知到能被称为威胁的事物，这点可以放心。
t_en: Just so you know, I haven't sensed anything that comes off as a threat in her. No need to be concerned about that.

t_ch: 出发的时间…
t_en: The departure time...

t_ch: 呵呵，未免有些迫不及待了呢。但正如领航员小姐所说，眼下还是多做点准备为好。
t_en: Hehe, looks like someone is a little impatient! But as the Navigator said, it's best for us to prepare as best as we can now.

t_ch: 耐心和优雅能赋予一个人绝妙的吸引力，你也试着放慢些步调吧？
t_en: Patience and elegance can give people an irresistible charm. Perhaps you should consider slowing down a bit?

t_ch: 我要窥视命运！
t_en: I want to glimpse into my destiny!

t_ch: 呵呵。虽说有所涉猎，但我可称不上通晓占卜，也不认为存在确信的未来。
t_en: Hehe, while I do have some knowledge of divination, I'm no expert, and I don't really believe in a predetermined future.

t_ch: 比起未来，我更关心你的过去呢。
t_en: Compared to the future, I find your past more intriguing.

t_ch: 聊聊其他事…
t_en: Talk about something else...

t_ch: 关于黑天鹅…
t_en: About Black Swan...

t_ch: 想知道更多我的事吗？
t_en: You want to know more about me?

t_ch: 列车上的生活如何？
t_en: How's life on the Express?

t_ch: 嗯…说是无所事事，似乎也不恰当。只是略微有些沉闷。
t_en: Hmm... I wouldn't call it boring... but, it's just been a bit uneventful.

t_ch: 好在某位开拓者{F#女士}{M#先生}常来探望，时时展现{F#她}{M#他}的鲜活，才不至于让一位搭车的女士向隅独泣。
t_en: Luckily, a certain {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Trailblazer often stops by, bringing {F#her}{M#his} vibrant energy to lift the spirits of this lonely passenger.

t_ch: {F#她}{M#他}还会再来，直到我也成为{F#她}{M#他}记忆的一部分…对吗？
t_en: Will {F#she}{M#he} keep visiting me until I find my place in {F#her}{M#his} memory?

t_ch: 想知道你的过去…
t_en: I want to know more about your past...

t_ch: 呀，你也对「记忆」充满好奇心呢，或许有踏上这条命途的潜质？
t_en: Ha! You're intrigued by the Remembrance as well? Maybe you're destined to follow THEIR Path!

t_ch: 我的建议是，不要只用言语探查他人的过往——而是要用心，呵呵。
t_en: A good rule of thumb is to uncover others' pasts not just with words, but with your heart, hehe.

t_ch: 想聊聊焚化工…
t_en: About The Cremators...

t_ch: 感到好奇也是在所难免。毕竟，你很难从人们口中听见对焚化工的正面评价。
t_en: I get why you'd be curious about them. People don't usually have nice things to say about The Cremators.

t_ch: 不过，我建议在做好准备前，还是不要贸然打听这群人的消息。因为这部分「记忆」…会让你在他们的视线中暴露无遗。
t_en: But until you're ready, I highly recommend not inquiring about them. Having this "memory" could reveal your presence before you.

t_ch: 聊聊其他事…
t_en: Talk about something else...

t_ch: 先聊到这里吧。
t_en: That's all I wanted to talk about.

t_ch: 没什么。
t_en: It's nothing.

t_ch: 茫然无措时，再来找我吧。
t_en: Feel free to talk to me whenever you're feeling lost.

t_ch: 让我猜猜…你不是来闲聊的，对吧？
t_en: Let me guess... You're not here just to chat, right?

t_ch: 关于翁法罗斯…
t_en: Regarding Amphoreus...

t_ch: 想了解目的地吗？是哪些方面呢？
t_en: You want to know about the destination? What would you like to know?

t_ch: 现有的信息…
t_en: The current information we have...

t_ch: 很遗憾。我从未踏足那里，所知同样甚少。
t_en: Unfortunately, I've never set foot there, hence my limited knowledge.

t_ch: 能确信的，只有忆庭之镜映照出的星球绝非寻常之地。更何况…那是个受三重命途纠缠的世界。
t_en: What is certain is that the planet reflected in the mirror of the Garden of Recollection is no ordinary place. Moreover... that is a world where the Three Paths are entangled.

t_ch: 忆庭的目的…
t_en: The goal of the Garden...

t_ch: 不如说，是我个人的目的。
t_en: It's better to call it my personal goal.

t_ch: 打捞湮没无闻的「记忆」是我的职责，而翁法罗斯…就像橱窗中的珍宝，星神的明光闪烁其间，令人沉醉不已。
t_en: It is my duty to salvage memories that are forgotten, while Amphoreus... is a treasure behind a window, with the Aeons' blinding light radiating from within, mesmerizing all.

t_ch: 能占卜一下风险吗？
t_en: Can you divine the risks?

t_ch: 呵呵。虽说有所涉猎，但我可称不上通晓占卜，也不觉得存在确信的未来。
t_en: Hee-hee. I have dabbled in such things, but it's not like I'm well-versed in divination, nor do I believe in a predetermined future.

t_ch: 比起未来，我更关心你的过去呢。
t_en: Compared to the future, I find your past more intriguing.

t_ch: 聊聊其他事…
t_en: Talk about something else...

t_ch: 没什么想聊的。
t_en: That's all for now.

t_ch: 茫然无措时，再来找我吧。
t_en: Feel free to talk to me whenever you're feeling lost.

t_ch: 你对翁法罗斯了解多少？
t_en: How much do you know about Amphoreus?

t_ch: 无数演员穷尽一生，只为自己能出现在这块小小的屏幕上。
t_en: Countless actors spend their whole lives just to get the chance to appear on this small screen.

t_ch: 每一副面孔，都代表着匹诺康尼艺术领域的最高成就。
t_en: Each face represents the highest achievement of the arts in Penacony.

t_ch: 除了知更鸟，你一个也不认识，但装作认识他们会显得你很有品味。
t_en: Apart from Robin, you don't know any of them, but acting like you do makes it seem like you have good taste.

t_ch: 在悲剧中嚎哭的人偶，高举的手得不到救赎。
t_en: A puppet who cries in a tragedy, with hands raised for unreachable salvation.

t_ch: 在喜剧中欢笑的人偶，放声感慨世界的幸福。
t_en: A puppet who laughs during a comedy, loudly releasing the world's happiness as a sigh.

t_ch: 在舞蹈中踮足的人偶，身形如谐乐鸽在振翅。
t_en: A puppet who loses themselves to the dance, their body akin to a Charmony Dove spreading its wings.

t_ch: 窗帘保护了贵宾的隐私，也为他们献上了窥视他人的权柄。
t_en: The curtain protects the privacy of elite guests and also provides them with the authority to spy on others.

t_ch: 窗外是剧院的舞台，一些尊贵的客人会留在这里，用望远镜观看剧目，或是遥望其他客人。
t_en: Beyond the window is the theater's stage. Some distinguished guests will linger there and use binoculars to watch a show or observe other guests.

t_ch: 这里的视角算不上完美，但对于有资格来到这里的宾客来说，重点并不是剧场上的演出，而是幕后与戏友的隐语。
t_en: The view from here isn't perfect, but for someone with the right qualifications to occupy this space, a theater's performance isn't the main course. That honor goes to the cryptic messages passed between friends of the theater behind the scenes.

t_ch: 非常抱歉，因突发事故影响，本剧院暂中止提供服务。
t_en: My apologies. The theater has temporarily suspended its services due to an accident.

t_ch: 一旁的前台淡定地平息着客人们的恐慌，虽然她已经紧张得快要当场醒过来了。
t_en: The receptionist off to the side calmly works to mollify the frightened guests, even though she herself is so nervous that she could wake up right then and there.

t_ch: 贵宾票请前往一号口，普通票请前往二号口，家族成员请前往三号口——都什么时候了，还惦记这几号口有意义吗？
t_en: Guests with VIP tickets, please proceed to Gate No. 1. Those with regular tickets, please go to Gate No. 2. Family members are to go to Gate No. 3. What's the point of remembering these gate numbers at a time like this?

t_ch: 在史诗中浅唱的人偶，战争与历史只余文字。
t_en: A puppet softly singing an epic saga. Wars and history leave only words.

t_ch: 在闹剧中惨死的人偶，吐息结束的最后一刻。
t_en: A puppet dying tragically in a farce. This is the moment of its last breath.

t_ch: 在爱剧中跌落的人偶，扭曲自己却求而不得。
t_en: A puppet who fell in a romance drama. It twists itself, yet cannot obtain its desire.

t_ch: 在懵懂中学语的人偶，所作所为皆镜中你我。
t_en: A puppet learning to speak. All our actions are reflected by it as if a mirror.

t_ch: 在寂静中沉思的人偶，未知谜题终得到解答。
t_en: A puppet contemplating in silence. The unknown puzzle is finally answered.

t_ch: 欢笑的人偶十分困惑——我们八个不是同一套动作吗？怎么词儿都各说各的？
t_en: The laughing puppet is confused: Didn't the eight of us perform the same set of actions? Why do we each have different lines?

t_ch: 学语的人偶表示，我不知道啊，我跟着大伙一起做的。
t_en: The puppet learning to speak states: I don't know, I just followed what everyone else did.

t_ch: 沉思的人偶表示，让它沉思了百年的就是这个问题。
t_en: The puppet in contemplation says: This is precisely the issue I spent a century deciphering.

t_ch: 想要成为盛会巨星吗？赶快来报名吧！注册只需一秒，成功却是永恒。
t_en: Yearning to become a Festive Superstar? Then you better sign up now! Registration is just a second, but success is forever.

t_ch: 我方郑重承诺，参赛者的个人隐私将得到严密保护，请放心使用该注册设备。
t_en: As we pledge to closely guard the privacy of all participants, please feel free to register with this device.

t_ch: 无奖问答，哪台是「钟表匠」曾经用过的？好吧，他本人可能也记不得了。
t_en: Here's a question for you, but no prize if you get it right. Which of these was used by the Watchmaker? Fine, he probably doesn't remember either.

t_ch: 完美诠释了「大就是好，多就是妙」的永恒真理。
t_en: This perfectly explains the timeless truth of "Bigger is better, and more is marvelous."

t_ch: 「音响给我使劲儿造！能做多大做多大，咱们苏乐达不差钱。」
t_en: "Put your back into making this sound system. The bigger, the better. SoulGlad isn't hurting for money."

t_ch: 事实证明，不管是不是心理作用，大号的音响用着是要爽快些。
t_en: The evidence shows that irrespective of whether it's psychological or not, a big speaker offers a more satisfying experience.

t_ch: 聚爆苏乐达，万吨级压缩，让您感受恒星炸裂的快感。
t_en: Explosion SoulGlad has a crazy high level of compression that'll give you that happy feeling of a planetary explosion.

t_ch: 请勿在赛前两个系统时内饮用，如无视警告，后果由参赛者自负。
t_en: Do not drink two system hours before a contest. Participants who ignore this warning will be responsible for the consequences.

t_ch: 虽然但是，在这种地方喝苏乐达，是否不太雅观。
t_en: It would be in poor taste to drink SoulGlad at a place like this.

t_ch: 冰点苏乐达，添加苍蓝薄荷精华，为您带来冻结星辰的寒冬。
t_en: Ice SoulGlad with blue mint essence brings you the cold blast of a frozen star.

t_ch: 请勿在赛前四个系统时内饮用，如无视警告，后果由参赛者自负。
t_en: Do not drink four system hours before a contest. Participants who ignore this warning will be responsible for the consequences.

t_ch: 虽然但是，在这种地方喝苏乐达，是否不太雅观。
t_en: It would be in poor taste to drink SoulGlad at a place like this.

t_ch: 盛会海选，一场人人平等的造星之旅。
t_en: The Festivity Auditions are a journey to discover a new star in a way that is fair to all who participate.

t_ch: 去摘下那颗星星吧！超越所有的对手，变得比任何人都要闪闪发光。
t_en: Pluck that star! Surpass all competitors and shine brighter than everyone else.

t_ch: 智慧、财富、歌喉、舞技，拼尽你所拥有的一切，让世界为你让路。
t_en: You've got it all: Intelligence, wealth, singing and dancing skills. Let the world make way for you.

t_ch: 每个人都有成为巨星的潜力，下一个被匹诺康尼记住的名字，就是未来的你！
t_en: Everyone has the potential to become a Superstar. The next name that everyone in Penacony remembers could be yours!
